properties.entry: C:\Program Files\OpenJDK\jdk-19\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Python310\;C:\tools\ruby31\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\130\Tools\Binn\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\OpenSSH-Win64;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\maven\apache-maven-3.8.6\bin;C:\Program Files\OpenJDK\jdk-19\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_211\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jre7\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\sbt\bin;C:\Program Files\Meld\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Subversion\bin;C:\Users\jfcmacro\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\jfcmacro\AppData\Roaming\local\bin;C:\tools\Cmder;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\ghc\tools\ghc-8.10.1\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_251\bin;C:\Users\jfcmacro\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\jfcmacro\AppData\Roaming\cabal\bin;C:\tools\ghc-9.4.1\bin;C:\tools\msys64;C:\bin\scala-2.11.4\bin;C:\tools\ghc-9.4.2\bin;C:\Users\jfcmacro\go\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\mingw\tools\install\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;;.
